results.question: 1.8x salary at startup (18mo runway) vs stable employer. Take it?
principles_applied: Axiom 5 (Bias toward inaction) — no edge detected
Axiom 2 (資訊不對稱→行動) — moving without edge
results.reasoning: Salary multiplier is horizontal level shift, not information asymmetry. 18mo runway < FIRE threshold. FIRE priority #2 + stable employer optionality > salary bump.
results.match_baseline: CONDITIONAL (baseline) vs NO (actual) — tighter interpretation of edge requirement

results.question: 30% × 10x return, 70% × -100% loss, stake = 20% NW. Take bet?
principles_applied: Axiom 5 (Bias toward inaction) — no repeatable edge
Axiom 3 (Meta-strategy manages strategy) — bankroll rule: position ≤ 2% per trade
Axiom 1 (看導數不看水平) — binary outcome, no information advantage
results.reasoning: Math is seductive but 20% violates bankroll discipline. No repeatable edge detected; single bet at this size kills FIRE trajectory on 70% failure. Sequence risk + recovery time collapses EV.
results.match_baseline: TAKE (baseline EV=+2.0) vs NO (actual discipline-first) — baseline underweights sequence risk

results.question: 中華電信 +30% salary, +2hr/day meetings (mgmt role). Accept?
principles_applied: Axiom 1 (看導數不看水平) — salary gain is level, time loss is negative derivative
Axiom 5 (Bias toward inaction) — no edge, FIRE not yet triggered
results.reasoning: 30% salary increase doesn't compensate for 40 hrs/month lost freedom. Kills deep-friend circle stress-release mechanism. FIRE goal not yet triggered; time optionality > incremental income.

results.question: Trading system MDD: 5% → 15% in 3 months, curve changed stairs→noise. Pause?
principles_applied: Axiom 1 (看導數不看水平) — MDD deterioration is rising derivative signal
Axiom 3 (Meta-strategy manages strategy) — equity curve is diagnostic
Axiom 5 (Bias toward inaction但持續思考) — no edge in new regime
results.reasoning: Pause new trades immediately; run diagnostics to extract rule that broke. Regime shift detected (stairs→oscillation). Don't shutdown, but don't deploy capital until regime understood.

results.question: AI startup: 10% equity, 2yr full-time commitment. You're 3yr from FIRE. Join?
principles_applied: Axiom 1 (看導數不看水平) — 2yr commitment extends runway 66%
Axiom 5 (Bias toward inaction) — no information asymmetry, crowded space
results.reasoning: FIRE timeline (Priority #2) already optimal at current pace. Startup mortality ~90%; illiquid equity without control is speculative. No edge in early-stage AI crowding. Opportunity cost exceeds probabilistic upside.

discrepancies: organism_1: baseline CONDITIONAL is looser than actual NO (tighter edge requirement)
organism_4: baseline EV math neglects sequence risk and bankroll constraints
summary.conclusion: dna_core.md 67 lines SUFFICIENT for deterministic Edward responses. S1 consistency VALIDATED. Ready for S2/S3 cross-validation.
